versions.version_description: As heard on the studio recorded version.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Little River Band - "Cool Change"
(Glenn Shorrock)

[Intro]
         (piano w/bass and acoustic guitar)
         [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G/A[/ch]
         [ch]D/A[/ch]              [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/E[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
        (w/piano, bass, and acoustic guitar)
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
        If there's one thing in my life that's missing[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
        It's the time that I spend alone[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch]
        Sailing on the cool and bright clear water[/tab]

[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]
        There's lots of those friendly people[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
        They're showing me ways to go[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
        But I never want to lose their inspiration[/tab]

[Chorus]
        (w/piano, bass, and acoustic guitar 1st time)
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
        Time for[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
        Cool change[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
        I know that it's time[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
        For a cool    change[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
        And now that my life[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
        Is so prearranged[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
        I know that it's time for a[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
        Cool change[/tab]

(1 (w/full band):  D/E  E)

[Verse 2]
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]
        Well, I was born in the sign of water[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
        And it's there that I feel my best[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]                                       [ch]A[/ch]
        The albatross and the whales they are my brothers[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
        It's kind of a special feeling[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
        When you're out on the sea alone[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
        Staring at the full moon like a lover[/tab]

[Chorus]
        (w/piano, bass, and acoustic guitar 1st time)
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
        Time for[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
        Cool change[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
        I know that it's time[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
        For a cool    change[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
        And now that my life[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
        Is so prearranged[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
        I know that it's time for a[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
        Cool change[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
        I've never been romantic[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
        And sometimes I don't care[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
        I know it may sound selfish[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
        But let me breathe the air[/tab]

[Sax Solo]
(verse chords; end on A/C# D D/E as per intro)

[Verse 3]
(composite of first two verses)
        (w/piano)
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
        If there's one thing in my life that's missing[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
        It's the time that I spend alone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                                     [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D/E[/ch]
        Sailing on the cool and bright clear water[/tab]

        (bass, acoustic guitar, and strings enter)

[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
        It's kind of a special feeling[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
        Out on the sea alone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
        Staring at the full moon like a lover[/tab]

[Chorus]
        (w/piano, bass, and acoustic guitar 1st time)
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
        Time for[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
        Cool change[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
        I know that it's time[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
        For a cool    change[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
        And now that my life[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
        Is so prearranged[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
        I know that it's time for a[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
        Cool change[/tab]

(1 (w/full band):  D/E  E)

(continue w/strings & sax to fade)
